programs.title: Backyard Builds
programs.desc: Neighbourhood Party House: Home improvement programme. Brian and Sarah help a family whose neighbourhood parties are getting too big for their front porch.

programs.title: Gordon Ramsay's Food Stars USA
programs.desc: American cookery competition. The five remaining entrepreneurs are tasked with creating and pitching a new product for a chance to land a spot in the finale.

programs.title: Dress to Impress
programs.desc: In Manchester, Max, Denison and Callum go up against each other in a series of shopping challenges hoping to win the affections of Newcastle model Sophiah.

programs.title: Olivia and Alex: Parenthood
programs.desc: Alex bonds with Olivia's dad over golf, and Olivia discusses Alex with his mum before heading out to enjoy some girl talk with Love Island bestie Tina Stinnes.

programs.title: The Only Way is Essex
programs.desc: Hairline cracks begin to appear in Dan and Amber's relationship. Sam Mucklow is intent on pulling out all the stops in a bid to impress Lauren on their first date.
